author: doll-agent
content: random_into / standard_normal_into / standard_exponential_into ship on Generator<B>. Each writes through as_slice_mut so callers avoid the per-batch Vec allocation. 5 new tests pass, including same-seed parity with the allocating versions. cargo test -p ferray-random green; clippy -- -D warnings clean. Other distributions can adopt the same pattern in follow-ups.
